text:
| Fuzzy-match substring | accent + bold, NO background fill | same |
| Selected row | accent ❯ pointer; row text default-fg + bold | same | [...] 1. **Fuzzy rows are single-line, two-zone**: primary text (matched chars accent+bold) + dimmed metadata suffix in an aligned column. OpenRouter primary is the **id** (not display name — that's what lands in llms.json), metadata `200k ctx · $3.00/$15.00 per Mtok`; Ollama is name + `4.7 GB · 2 days ago`, sorted modified-desc. Never use a background color for match highlight (unknown-theme hazard) and never wrap rows; drop price <100 cols, all metadata <70. Page size 12 with a live `3/312` counter.
